{{Infobox character
| name = Lirin
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Lirin is a young individual who possesses an intimate knowledge of the Grave, navigating its gray corridors with ease. He is the child of two parents who possess extraordinary auditory abilities and maintain a strict, safety-oriented approach to his upbringing. Lirin harbors an interest in the spiritual pressure forge, a large machine used for compressing energy into gemstones. During an interaction with his father in the Grave, Lirin participates in a training exercise involving a shallow bowl. Despite some initial anxiety regarding the potential consequences of the activity, he follows his parents' guidance and places his hand into the vessel, experiencing a tingling sensation.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|While his father was lost in thought, Lirin was instructed to place his hand into a bowl and cycle his [[madra]]. Despite worries that the process might cause him pain, he followed the directions while his parents remained concerned for his safety. Upon placing his hand in the bowl, Lirin experienced a reaction from his cores as two forms of power resonated with the energy within. This interaction ultimately produced a blue-white cloud and a sculpture that resembled a frozen tree.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]] was lost in thought.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]] instructed him to put his hand into a bowl and cycle his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin]] was worried that putting his hand in the bowl might hurt.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin]]'s parents are concerned about his safety.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|When [[Lirin]] put his hand in the bowl, he felt a reaction from his cores.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Two forms of power from [[Lirin]]'s cores resonated with the energy in the bowl.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin]]'s interaction with the bowl produced a blue-white cloud and a sculpture resembling a frozen tree.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
